title: ophioglossum vulgatum var. minus
intro: Ophioglossum vulgatum var. minus, also known as the less common or lesser chain fern, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Ophioglossum vulgatum plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with the plant include its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared for consumption through infusions or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
